_meta.name: Skill Search
_meta.description: Semantic/keyword search over the 57 apple-dev skills and their reference docs. Use to find the right skill or guidance without loading full SKILL.md files into context. 3 tools: search_skills (BM25 keyword search returning top chunks), list_skills (all skill names + descriptions), get_skill_section (full text of a skill or specific heading).
_meta.notes: Zero-auth, zero-infra. Ships as a self-contained bundle inside the plugin; indexes the plugin's bundled skills/**/*.md at startup (lazy, in-memory) via SKILL_SEARCH_ROOT. No API key required. Use search_skills to discover which skill covers a topic; use get_skill_section to read the full guidance once identified.
_meta.instructions: Call search_skills(query) first whenever you need to find guidance on an Apple development topic. It returns ranked chunks with {skill, file, heading, snippet, score} so you can identify the right skill without reading entire files. Then call get_skill_section(skill, heading?) to load only the section you need.
